releaseNotes: Property descriptions: 372 attributes covered with Chinese and English tooltips. Hover the ? badge to see what each property does. Enum values documented (DragType, PartCollisionResponse, LoadContext, etc.). JFuselage shape editor with parameter tooltips. PartData real-time apply for common edits (Health, Position, Rotation, PartScale, mass values). Designer camera zoom limit adjustable (75-5000). Custom XML attribute add/remove. Hotkey toggle on/off. Floating button (draggable, lockable, collapsible). Language switching (zh-CN/en-US) with extensible localization interface. Update checker.
